bundles.title: Create Phase Semantics Baseline
bundles.goal: Establish a spec-level authority that defines the six-role meaning of every canonical workflow phase, including terminal phases.
outputs: phase semantics role matrix for 21 phases

tasks.title: Extract the canonical phase set and vocabulary constraints from the owning baseline specs
Define the six mandatory phase roles, terminal sentinels, and delegation boundary classifications for the new baseline
Enumerate all 21 phases with per-phase values for inputs, outputs, completion, branching, and delegation
Archive the change so the new phase-semantics baseline exists and validates cleanly

bundles.title: Ground Phase Contract Types
bundles.goal: Make the PhaseContract baseline an explicit lossless encoding of phase-semantics without adding new interface fields.

tasks.title: Map the six semantic roles onto existing PhaseContract fields and document the lossless encoding requirement
Declare cliCommands a normative encoding of deterministic work rather than an adapter-private detail
Align the baseline wording with the no-new-fields constraint and the phase-semantics authority model

bundles.title: Ground Phase Contract Structure
bundles.goal: Anchor PhaseIODescriptor and GateCondition in the phase-semantics role model while preserving the current structural surface.

tasks.title: Define how required inputs and expected outputs are expressed through PhaseIODescriptor
Define how branching and gate conditions are expressed through GateCondition using existing vocabulary only
Clarify the discriminated-union extension policy and cross-references back to phase-semantics

bundles.title: Reconcile Phase Contract Registry Data
bundles.goal: Make the TypeScript phase contract registry recover every phase-semantics role from existing fields for all 21 phases.

tasks.title: Audit every phaseContractData entry against the per-phase semantics matrix
Update existing encoding fields for inputs, outputs, events, gates, delegation, terminal markers, and next-phase metadata
Normalize explicit empty-set and terminal-sentinel encodings for terminal and purely agent-delegated phases
Record any intentional residual disagreements as Accepted Spec Conflicts with rationale and follow-up references

bundles.title: Reconcile Slash Command Prose
bundles.goal: Remove factual disagreements between slash command templates and phase-semantics while leaving broader prose redesign out of scope.

tasks.title: Audit command templates for incorrect inputs, outputs, branching, or delegation claims
Correct factual mismatches so command prose references phase meaning instead of redefining it incorrectly
Capture any large unresolved prose gaps as Accepted Spec Conflicts with follow-up references

bundles.title: Align Phase Contract Tests
bundles.goal: Update value-level tests so they validate the reconciled registry data without changing the public structure of the test suite.

tasks.title: Update assertions that lock in old PhaseContract values to match the reconciled registry data
Preserve the current test structure and add only minimal losslessness coverage if required
Run the phase-contract test targets and confirm green assertions after the data sweep

bundles.title: Validate Phase Semantics Rollout
bundles.goal: Prove that the new semantic authority, encodings, data, prose, and tests are mutually consistent and ready for review.

tasks.title: Run openspec validate and spec verification across the archived baselines and reconciled artifacts
Confirm that any Accepted Spec Conflicts are fully documented or that no unresolved divergences remain
Assemble review evidence showing tests are green and the change is ready for design and apply review gates
